sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54732" key="katapata/kthn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταπᾰτάκτην</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">καταπατηκτην</itype>, prob. ff.ll. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καταπακτήν</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καταπηκτήν</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θύραν</foreign>) <sense id="n54732.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">trap-door</tr_>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dungeon</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aq.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Je.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29(36).26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
